description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:buster Docker image, with a cache for node_modules/ and .yarn, and set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define two stages: test and release. Add a py-qa job in the test stage that runs the shared before_script (echo "deb http://archive.debian.org/debian buster main contrib non-free" > /etc/apt/sources.list; apt-get update -qy; apt-get install -qy make git; make debian-nosudo; pip install -U pip; make pip-nosudo; make pip-dev; make db) then executes make qa, is allowed to fail, and only runs on the master branch. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the same before_script and then runs make unit, also only on the master branch.
